notes: Fix: TLS=Auto was timing out against plain-TCP Redis (port-forwards, local dev). Previous probe order was [TLS, plain] with a fallback heuristic that didn't match the 'timed out' that TLS-against-plain-Redis produces. Now it's plain-first (matches the common case + dodges the 10s TLS-probe-against-plain hang) with a direction-aware fallback heuristic: reset/eof/unexpected-reply triggers TLS retry; refused/NOAUTH/wrongpass propagate immediately.
